path.id: Trust benchmark numbers and understand what was measured so comparisons are fair.
Match the chosen hardware definition to an approved hardware profile (HWP) or an explicit request path.
Run the model with chosen HWP and compression, grounded in benchmark assumptions for ongoing monitoring.
Choose hardware, compression, and SLO tradeoffs with transparent recommendation logic.
Land on a candidate validated model that fits the use case and constraints before deep benchmark reading.
